columns.name: game_id
columns.comment: Represents the unique identifier for a specific game, allowing for easy tracking and referencing of game data.

columns.name: season
columns.comment: Indicates the NFL season during which the game is played, useful for historical analysis and comparisons.

columns.name: week
columns.comment: Denotes the week of the NFL season when the game occurs, providing context to the timing of the match within the season.

columns.name: game_type
columns.comment: Specifies the type of game, such as regular season or playoff, which can impact betting strategies and analyses.

columns.name: gameday
columns.comment: Describes the specific date when the game is scheduled to take place, important for scheduling and event tracking.

columns.name: home_team
columns.comment: Identifies the team designated as the home team for the game, which may influence odds and betting decisions.

columns.name: away_team
columns.comment: Recognizes the team designated as the away team for the game, providing context for matchups and performance expectations.

columns.name: spread_line
columns.comment: Reflects the point spread established by bookmakers that indicates the expected margin of victory for the home team.

columns.name: total_line
columns.comment: Summarizes the combined total points expected to be scored by both teams, which is critical for over/under betting.

columns.name: away_moneyline
columns.comment: Shows the moneyline odds for the away team, representing their potential payout relative to a bet placed on them.

columns.name: home_moneyline
columns.comment: Displays the moneyline odds for the home team, indicating the potential return on a bet placed in their favor.

columns.name: away_spread_odds
columns.comment: Indicates the odds associated with betting on the away team to cover the spread, which can vary based on perceived team strength.

columns.name: home_spread_odds
columns.comment: Represents the odds for betting on the home team to cover the spread, important for understanding risk and potential returns.

columns.name: under_odds
columns.comment: Details the odds for betting on the total score to be under the total line set by bookmakers, relevant for betting strategies.

columns.name: over_odds
columns.comment: Presents the odds for betting on the total score to exceed the total line, useful for evaluating the likelihood of high-scoring games.

columns.name: source
columns.comment: Denotes the origin of the odds information, which can provide insights into the credibility and accuracy of the data.

columns.name: bookmaker
columns.comment: Identifies the specific bookmaker offering the odds, essential for comparing lines and betting strategies.

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.comment: Captures the timestamp of when the odds data was ingested into the system, important for tracking data freshness.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.comment: Contains the name of the source file from which the odds data was obtained, aiding in data traceability and quality control.
